TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 1
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.290.cipherString: Once you believe that you can do it and do take the first step forward, stop doubting yourself.
CIPHER.290.question: The gym's scoreboard glitched during dodgeball to show this Aristocrat Cipher by Nabil N. Jamal. What does it say?
CIPHER.290.author: Nabil N. Jamal

CIPHER.286.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Pittacus of Mytilene, written in an Affine with a=9 and b=17. What does it say?
CIPHER.286.author: Pittacus of Mytilene

CIPHER.266.cipherString: Nothing in this world compares to the comfort and security of having someone just hold your hand.
CIPHER.266.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich, encrypted with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.266.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.287.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Affine-encrypted message with a=15 and b=19. What does it say?
CIPHER.287.author: Unknown

CIPHER.285.cipherString: Science consists exactly of those forms of knowledge that can be verified and duplicated by anybody.
CIPHER.285.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Seth Lloyd, encrypted with a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.285.author: Seth Lloyd

CIPHER.272.cipherString: I have a vest. If I had my arms cut off, it would be a jacket.
CIPHER.272.question: A mysterious app update added this Baconian lock screen—it's actually Mitch Hedberg's quote. What does it say?
CIPHER.272.author: Mitch Hedberg

CIPHER.269.cipherString: The only way to maintain a moderate sum of happiness in this life, is not to worry about the future or regret the past too much.
CIPHER.269.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Mel Gibson encoded using a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with MUCH. What does it say?
CIPHER.269.author: Mel Gibson

CIPHER.275.cipherString: To understand someone, find out how he spends his money.
CIPHER.275.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote by Mason Cooley written in a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has HOWHES in it corresponding to the encoded text Q N J R P L Y X N, meaning J = –––; L = ●●●; N = ●●×; P = –××; Q = ×●●; R = ×●–; X = ××●; Y = ●×●. What does it say?
CIPHER.275.author: Mason Cooley

CIPHER.267.cipherString: The ego relies on the familiar. It is reluctant to experience the unknown, which is they very essence of life.
CIPHER.267.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Deepak Chopra, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.267.author: Deepak Chopra

CIPHER.274.cipherString: Failure implies a failed day not a failed life.
CIPHER.274.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Fractionated Morse puzzle by Amit Kalantri. You are told that the quote has DDAYN in it corresponding to the encoded text C Z I E D O F, meaning C = –●●; D = –●–; E = ●–×; F = –●×; I = ●●×; O = –××; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.274.author: Amit Kalantri

CIPHER.268.cipherString: At some point, you just pull off the Band-Aid and it hurts, but then its over and you're relieved.
CIPHER.268.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by John Green encoded in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.268.author: John Green

CIPHER.281.cipherString: It's always such a joy that you wake up in the morning and there's work to do.
CIPHER.281.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Jerome Lawrence, written in a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has KTODO somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.281.author: Jerome Lawrence

CIPHER.284.cipherString: Keep your best wishes, close to your heart and watch what happens
CIPHER.284.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Atbash banner by Tony DeLiso. What does it say?
CIPHER.284.author: Tony DeLiso

CIPHER.271.cipherString: Discipline transforms the gifted to the great.
CIPHER.271.question: The following strange headlines encode a phrase by Raul Ramos y Sanchez using a Baconian alphabet. You are told that the cipher text BOOK A HOTEL CATCH DRIED decodes to be SCIP. What does it say?
CIPHER.271.author: Raul Ramos y Sanchez

CIPHER.279.cipherString: I must be willing to give up what I am in order to become what I will be.
CIPHER.279.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Porta Cipher by Albert Einstein using a keyword of SIXTH. What does it say?
CIPHER.279.author: Albert Einstein

CIPHER.273.cipherString: Do people who bring bikes on the subway realize what bikes do?
CIPHER.273.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.273.author: Unknown

CIPHER.288.cipherString: Those who lack the courage will always find a philosophy to justify it.
CIPHER.288.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Checkerboard quote from Albert Camus with a polybius key of PITCHERS. What does it say?
CIPHER.288.author: Albert Camus

CIPHER.283.cipherString: Art is the concrete representation of our most subtle feelings.
CIPHER.283.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Nihilist Substitution quote by Agnes Martin with a keyword of TANKER and polybius key of COMPLAINTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.283.author: Agnes Martin

CIPHER.289.cipherString: True happiness is not found in people, places, or things. It is found in our own hearts.
CIPHER.289.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Checkerboard-encrypted quote by Avijeet Das with a polybius key of NIGHTMARE. What does it say?
CIPHER.289.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.276.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 7318 4693165 2619246 5608 decode to?

CIPHER.282.cipherString: I don't have an attitude; I have a personality you can't handle.
CIPHER.282.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote, encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of MAYOR and polybius key of CAMPSITE. What does it say?
CIPHER.282.author: Unknown

CIPHER.278.cipherString: The telephone will be used to inform people that a telegram has been sent.
CIPHER.278.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Alexander Graham Bell encoded as a Porta using a keyword of HERO. What does it say?
CIPHER.278.author: Alexander Graham Bell

CIPHER.277.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Cryptarithm message. What do the values 4622863 723512 9503 decode to?

CIPHER.270.cipherString: El tiempo y el dinero gastados en ayudar a los hombres a hacer más por sí mismos es mucho mejor que simplemente dar.
CIPHER.270.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Henry Ford in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with EL. What does it say?
CIPHER.270.author: Henry Ford
CIPHER.270.translation: Time and money spent in helping men to do more for themselves is far better than mere giving.

CIPHER.280.cipherString: Hopes, wants and wishes, all cast across the night sky with my heart in tow.
CIPHER.280.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Jay Long, encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has ASTA somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.280.author: Jay Long
